name: bioresearch_run
description: Execute a biomedical research workflow (literature review, biomarker discovery, or causal inference) and return structured outputs.

workflow.description: Type of research workflow to execute.

query.description: Research query for literature review workflow.

disease.description: Disease name for biomarker discovery workflow.

exposure.description: Exposure trait for causal inference workflow.

outcome.description: Outcome trait for causal inference workflow.
